entries.definition: money or benefits given to someone in exchange for work, or as reparation for loss, injury, or suffering
entries.exampleSentence: After the accident, she received substantial compensation for her injuries and lost wages.

entries.definition: something that offsets or makes up for a weakness, disadvantage, or undesirable situation
entries.exampleSentence: His natural charm was more than adequate compensation for his lack of formal education.
